response.justification: While Bogdan is technically exceptional with 20 years of development experience and demonstrated expertise in developer tooling and infrastructure, he lacks the fundamental people management experience that is a minimum requirement for this management role. His resume shows no evidence of managing teams, conducting performance reviews, or developing direct reports—only mentoring and knowledge-sharing as an individual contributor. This is a disqualifying gap for a full-time people-leadership position.
strengths: 20+ years of software development experience with demonstrated Staff-level technical expertise across multiple domains and technologies
Relevant background in developer tooling and infrastructure, including GitLab administration, CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, and build systems
Proven commitment to code quality, testing practices, and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and open-source projects
concerns: No formal people management experience—resume contains no evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or team leadership
Developer tools experience is scattered across various roles rather than focused; lacks concentrated 3+ years specifically on compilers, automated releases, or test automation
Currently in individual contributor track (Staff Engineer); no demonstrated progression toward or stated interest in people management responsibilities
